CustomField.description: Should include the following text: You can submit the purchase order via fax to 0800 891 714 or via email on cc.uk@perkinelmer.com Please ensure the Quote Number located in the top is included on your Purchase Order. If your company is VAT exempt please supply the exemption certificate when sending in your Purchase Order.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Please include: You can submit the purchase order via fax to 0800 891 714 or via email on cc.uk@perkinelmer.com Please ensure the Quote Number located in the top is included on your Purchase Order. If your company is VAT exempt please
CustomField.label: Estimate PO Terms
